title: Biometric Data Security Plan
scenario: Develop a comprehensive biometric data security plan for a government agency, including procedures for collecting, storing, and disseminating sensitive biometric data. The plan should address potential risks and vulnerabilities, as well as implementation and maintenance requirements. The target output should be a detailed, 5-page document with clear headings, concise paragraphs, and numbered lists.
constraints: Must be written from the perspective of a chief information security officer
Must include at least 5 different biometric data protection protocols

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated plan adheres to the specified constraints and format.
The plan covers all required biometric data security protocols for the government agency.
The plan is easy to understand and free of unnecessary information.
The plan is properly formatted and structured using a standard biometric data security plan template.
